Functions
AppCastMaker

SignatureManager

Options 
options
)
GetAppCastExtension
public abstract string GetAppCastExtension()

Get the file extension (without any "." preceding the extension) for the app cast file.  e.g., "xml"

Returns

Extension for the app cast file

SerializeItemsToFile
public abstract void SerializeItemsToFile(
List<AppCastItem> 
items,
string 
applicationTitle,
string 
path
)

Serialize a list of AppCastItem items to a file at the given path with the given title.  Overwrites any file at the given path. Does not verify that the given directory structure for the output file exists.

Parameters
items
List<AppCastItem>

List of AppCastItem items to write

applicationTitle
string

Title of application (or app cast)

path
string

Output file path/name

GetItemsAndProductNameFromExistingAppCast
public abstract (List<AppCastItem>, string?) GetItemsAndProductNameFromExistingAppCast(
string 
appCastFileName,
bool 
overwriteOldItemsInAppcast
)

Loads an existing app cast file and loads its AppCastItem items and any product name that is in the file.  Should not return duplicate versions.  Sorting should be done after reading in the file is done and items are parsed, as duplicates will be overwritten in the order they are read.  The items list should always be non-null and sorted by AppCastItem.Version descending when the function is complete.

Parameters
appCastFileName
string

File name/path for app cast file to read

overwriteOldItemsInAppcast
bool

If true and an item is loaded with a version that has already been found, overwrite the already found item with the newly found one

Returns

Tuple of items and the product name (product name can be null if file does not exist or file does not contain a product name)

string 
segment
)

GetPathToAppCastOutput
public string GetPathToAppCastOutput(
string 
desiredOutputDirectory,
string 
sourceBinaryDirectory,
string 
appCastFileName
= 
"appcast"
)

Gets the path to the app cast output file. If desiredOutputDirectory is null/whitespace, uses sourceBinaryDirectory as the output location instead.  Does not check to see if the directory exists!

Parameters
desiredOutputDirectory
string
sourceBinaryDirectory
string
appCastFileName
string

file name for output w/o extension or . for extension

sourceBinaryDirectory,
bool 
useExistingAppCastItems,
string 
outputAppCastFileName,
string? 
singleFileToAddToAppCast
 = 
null
)

sourceBinaryDirectory
string
Returns

items, product name

signatureFileExtension
